calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS., APR-10-2008: GARY SIEGEL APPEARS AS THE REPRESENTATIVE FOR S.F. AUTO REPAIR CENTER, INC; PAMELA ZILAVY APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA THIS DAY FOR THE TRIAL DE NOVO.

THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND ALSO REVIEWS SUMMARIES FOR BOTH APPELLANT AND RESPONDENT THAT ARE NOT MARKED AS EXHIBITS IN THE CAUSE THIS DATE; THE COURT ALSO REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PREVIOUSLY PRESENTED.

AFTER HEARING ALL ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED AND AFTER REVIEWING WRITTEN DOCUMENTATION PRESENTED, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID H.S. COMMINS; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Continued To Apr-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
